name: i9 Sports Soccer League - Todd Beamer (Spring 2026)
description: i9 Sports co-ed youth soccer league at Todd Beamer High School in Federal Way. Six-week Spring 2026 season with practice and a game on Saturdays at the same field, one day per week. Age divisions 4-5, 6-8, and 9-11. Program is run by the Tacoma/Lakewood/Federal Way i9 Sports franchise office (League Office 489).
schedule_text: Saturdays, practice and game between 9:00 AM and 2:00 PM (varies by age division)

name: i9 Sports Baseball League - Todd Beamer (Spring 2026)
description: i9 Sports co-ed youth baseball league at Todd Beamer High School in Federal Way for ages 3-6. Six-week Spring 2026 season with practice and game on the same Saturday, one day per week. Age divisions 3-4 and 5-6 each meet between 9:00 AM and 12:00 PM. Run by the Tacoma/Lakewood/Federal Way i9 Sports franchise office (League Office 489).

name: i9 Sports Soccer League - Lakes High School (Spring 2026)
description: i9 Sports co-ed youth soccer league at Lakes High School in Lakewood. Six-week Spring 2026 season meeting Sundays, with practice and game on the same field one day per week. Age divisions are 4, 5-6, 7-8, and 9. Run by the Tacoma/Lakewood/Federal Way i9 Sports franchise office (League Office 489).
schedule_text: Sundays between 9:00 AM and 5:00 PM (time varies by age division)

name: i9 Sports Baseball League - Lakes High School (Spring 2026)
description: i9 Sports co-ed youth baseball league at Lakes High School in Lakewood for ages 3-6. Six-week Spring 2026 season meeting Sundays, with practice and game on the same day. Age divisions 3-4 and 5-6 each play between 9:00 AM and 12:00 PM. Run by the Tacoma/Lakewood/Federal Way i9 Sports franchise office (League Office 489).

name: Nike Soccer Camp at Hilltop Heritage Middle School (June 29 - July 3)
description: Nike Soccer Camp run by US Sports Camps and directed by former Tacoma Stars professional Alex Megson. Five-day summer day camp at Hilltop Heritage Middle School. Two programs run side by side: Early Childhood Development for ages 5-6 (half day, 9 AM-12 PM, $280) and Player Development for ages 7-15 with half day ($280) or full day 9 AM-3 PM ($390). Campers are grouped by age, ability, and experience and work on technical training, small-sided games, and tactical work. Lunch is not provided.

name: Nike Soccer Camp at Hilltop Heritage Middle School (July 27 - July 31)
description: Second 2026 session of the Nike Soccer Camp at Hilltop Heritage Middle School in Tacoma, run by US Sports Camps and directed by former Tacoma Stars pro Alex Megson. Five-day summer day camp running July 27 to July 31. Programs include Early Childhood Development for ages 5-6 (half day only, 9 AM-12 PM, $280) and Player Development for ages 7-15 with half day ($280) or full day 9 AM-3 PM ($390). Lunch is not provided. Players bring soccer cleats, shin guards, and a water bottle.

name: Nike Soccer Camp with Tacoma Stars at Tacoma Soccer Center
description: Nike Soccer Camp coached by Tacoma Stars pro indoor staff and run through US Sports Camps. Five-day day camp held on indoor turf at the Tacoma Soccer Center. Future Stars program for ages 4-6 runs as a half day. Player Development for ages 7-15 is offered as half day ($280) or full day ($390). Camp Director is Alex Caceres. Curriculum focuses on technical precision, quick decision-making, and indoor-style training.

name: Nike Soccer Camp with Tacoma Stars at SERA Sports Complex
description: Nike Soccer Camp coached by Tacoma Stars staff at SERA Sports Complex in Tacoma, run through US Sports Camps. Five-day day camp on turf with two programs: Future Stars for ages 4-6 (half day, $280) and Player Development for ages 7-15 (half day $280 or full day $390). Players are grouped by age and ability with a focus on indoor-style technical training, small-sided games, and tactical work.

name: Challenger Sports Foundational Skills Camp - DuPont Week 1
description: Challenger Sports Foundational Skills Camp held at DuPont Powder Works Park in coordination with DuPont Park & Recreations. Five-day day camp where international coaching staff lead age-grouped technical training and small-sided games for ages 3 to 14. Sessions emphasize ball control, dribbling, passing, and game understanding. Shin guards are required for ages 6 and up or any session over three hours.

name: Challenger Sports Foundational Skills Camp - DuPont Week 2
description: Second week of the Challenger Sports Foundational Skills Camp at DuPont Powder Works Park, run with DuPont Park & Recreations. Five-day soccer day camp for ages 3-14 led by international coaches with age-appropriate technical instruction, small-sided games, and a tactical introduction. Multiple session lengths are offered with early-bird pricing applied at checkout.

name: Challenger Sports Foundational Skills Camp - NorPoint at Meeker Middle School
description: Challenger Sports Foundational Skills Camp partnered with NorPoint SC and held at Meeker Middle School in northeast Tacoma. Five-day soccer day camp for ages 3-14 led by international coaches. Curriculum focuses on technical foundational skills, small-sided games, and a tactical introduction grouped by age and ability. Multiple session lengths are available with early-bird pricing applied at checkout.

name: Summer at Annie Wright - Grade 1-2 Mixed Athletics: Swimming & Volleyball (June 22-26)
description: Half-day weeklong athletics camp at Annie Wright Schools for students entering grades 1-2 in fall. Activities split between volleyball and swimming, held at the Murray Barbey Family Pool and adjacent gym on the AWS campus. Run by AWS faculty and local coaches. Half-day morning session 9:00 AM to 12:00 PM. Full-day options available with afternoon arts session add-on. Home-packed lunch required for full day attendees.

name: Summer at Annie Wright - Grade 3-6 Athletics: Soccer (June 22-26)
description: Half-day weeklong soccer camp at Annie Wright Schools for students entering grades 3-6 in fall. Held outdoors at James Memorial Field on the AWS campus. Morning session 9:00 AM to 12:00 PM, Monday through Friday. Local coaches and AWS faculty lead skill-building, small-sided play, and team activities. Full-day options available by adding an afternoon arts session.

name: Summer at Annie Wright - Grade 4-6 Painting The PNW (June 22-26)
description: Half-day weeklong visual arts camp at Annie Wright Schools for students entering grades 4-6. Painting-focused program inspired by Pacific Northwest landscapes and imagery. Held in the AWS Studio Spaces, Monday through Friday, 1:00 PM to 4:00 PM. Led by local arts instructors. Full-day enrollment available by combining with a morning session.

name: Summer at Annie Wright - Grade 1-2 Mixed Arts: Little Artist World Tour & Music From Art (June 22-26)
description: Half-day weeklong mixed arts camp at Annie Wright Schools for students entering grades 1-2. Combines visual art exploration around a 'world tour' theme with music-from-art activities. Held in AWS Studio Spaces, Monday-Friday 1:00 PM to 4:00 PM. Led by AWS faculty and local arts educators.

name: Summer at Annie Wright - Grade 3-5 Arts: Finders, Makers (June 22-26)
description: Half-day weeklong mixed arts camp at Annie Wright Schools for students entering grades 3-5 in fall. Hands-on collecting and making program in the AWS Studio Spaces, Monday-Friday 1:00 PM to 4:00 PM. Led by AWS faculty and local arts instructors. Limited capacity, small group setting.

name: CWA Summer Camp - Sports Camp: Volleyball (Grades 1-2)
description: Half-day weeklong volleyball camp at Charles Wright Academy for students entering grades 1-2 in fall. Held on the 107-acre CWA campus, Monday-Friday 8:30 AM to 11:30 AM. Combines an hour and a half of volleyball-focused instruction with general camp activities such as field games, forest exploration, and outdoor classroom time. Coaches lead skill-building, teamwork, and player safety. Aftercare is available until 5:30 PM at extra cost.

name: CWA Summer Camp - Sports Camp: Tennis (Grades 3-5)
description: Half-day weeklong tennis camp at Charles Wright Academy for students entering grades 3-5 in fall. Monday-Friday 8:30 AM to 11:30 AM on the CWA campus. Combines focused tennis instruction with general camp activities such as field games, forest hikes, arts and crafts, and outdoor classroom time. Coaches are CWA athletics staff who also coach during the school year. Aftercare available until 5:30 PM at extra cost.

name: CWA Summer Camp - Sports Camp: Soccer (Grades 3-5)
description: Half-day weeklong soccer camp at Charles Wright Academy for students entering grades 3-5 in fall. Monday-Friday 8:30 AM to 11:30 AM. Held on the CWA campus athletics fields, combined with general camp activities such as field games, forest hikes, arts and crafts, and outdoor classroom time. Coaches are CWA athletics staff. Lunch is camper-provided; aftercare available until 5:30 PM at extra cost.

name: CWA Summer Camp - Sports Camp: Basketball (Grades 3-5)
description: Half-day weeklong basketball camp at Charles Wright Academy for students entering grades 3-5 in fall. Monday-Friday 8:30 AM to 11:30 AM in CWA's athletics facilities. Combined with general camp activities including field games, forest exploration, arts and crafts, and outdoor classroom time. Coaches are CWA athletics staff who coach throughout the school year. Aftercare available until 5:30 PM at extra cost.

name: CWA Summer Camp - Sports Camp: Flag Football (Grades 3-5)
description: Half-day weeklong flag football camp at Charles Wright Academy for students entering grades 3-5 in fall. Monday-Friday 8:30 AM to 11:30 AM. Held on the CWA campus athletics fields and combined with general camp activities like field games, forest hikes, and outdoor classroom time. Coaches are CWA athletics staff. Aftercare available until 5:30 PM at extra cost.
